title: Fruit and Vegetable Customs Orders Validation Act
title_en: Fruit and Vegetable Customs Orders Validation Act
short_name: Fruit and Vegetable Customs Orders Va...
description: Fruit and Vegetable Customs Orders Validation Act (Fruit and Vegetable Customs Orders Va...). Current to 2026-02-04.

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: 1 This Act may be cited as the Fruit and Vegetable Customs Orders Validation Act .

provisions.title: Validation of orders
provisions.content: 2 Notwithstanding any other Act, orders made in respect of imported fresh fruits and vegetables pursuant to paragraph 15(1)(a) of the Customs Tariff between January 1, 1972 and January 10, 1985 are declared to have been validly made and any customs duties collected on such fruits and vegetables pursuant to those orders are declared to have been validly collected.

provisions.title: Remission of duties
provisions.content: 3 Customs duties imposed between June 28, 1984 and January 10, 1985 on imported fresh fruits and vegetables by orders made pursuant to paragraph 15(1)(a) of the Customs Tariff and not collected are hereby remitted.
